title: WordCountsRequest
description: Schema for WordCountsRequest in Nuix REST API

queryList.description: The set of queries which will be executed.

deduplication.description: The deduplication to apply over each query. Defaults to 'none'

field.description: Specifies the field to search over each query. Defaults to all.

sort.description: Sorts the results from most frequent to least frequent. Defaults to off.

minOccurs.description: Returns only results occurring at least this number of times.

maxOccurs.description: Returns only results occurring at most this number of times.

minWordLength.description: Limits results to words whose length is greater than or equal to this value.

maxWordLength.description: Limits results to words whose length is less than or equal to this value.

filter.description: Limits results to words that match the filter.  Default is 'all'

maxResults.description: Limits the size of the returned list of word counts.  Defaults to 200; use -1 for no limit.
